scripts.build:all: npm run build:site && npm run build:docs
scripts.combine: mkdir -p local-deploy/mkdocs-plus-react-example && cp -r docs/test/out/* local-deploy/mkdocs-plus-react-example/ && mkdir -p local-deploy/mkdocs-plus-react-example/docs && cp -r site/* local-deploy/mkdocs-plus-react-example/docs/
scripts.preview: npm run build:all && npm run combine && npm run serve
